answer:
When Serge Mouret regained his memory, he was instantly wracked with guilt over his unwitting sins with Albine. This plunged him into a deeper religious fervour than ever before, abandoning Albine. She was left bewildered at the loss of her soulmate.  

\boxed{\text{Serge was wracked with guilt, plunged into deeper religious fervour, and abandoned Albine.}}
